infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HAVEN uses the camera to scan medication labels and care documents when you choose to do so.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: HAVEN uses the microphone so you can speak medication confirmations and ask for help.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: HAVEN uses speech recognition to turn your spoken requests into safe care actions.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: HAVEN uses your location during safety features such as fall response and safe-zone support.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: HAVEN can keep safety location monitoring active in the background when you enable it.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: HAVEN can sync medical appointments to your calendar when you enable agenda sync.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: HAVEN can sync medical appointments to your calendar when you enable agenda sync.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow HAVEN to use the camera for medication labels and care documents.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow HAVEN to use the microphone for voice help and medication confirmations.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow HAVEN to keep safety location monitoring active when enabled.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow HAVEN to keep safety location monitoring active when enabled.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow HAVEN to use your location for fall response and safe-zone support.

plugins.calendarPermission: Allow HAVEN to sync medical appointments with your calendar.
